ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the site */,
  "site_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of simulations that can be run concurrently at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_generators" (
  "response_generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response generator */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the response generator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response generator */,
  "generator_version" TEXT /* Version number of the response generator */,
  "generator_type" TEXT /* Type of response generator (e.g., human-generated, AI-generated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam or scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exam or scenario */,
  "exam_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam or scenario in minutes */,
  "exam_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the exam or scenario (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "site_id" TEXT /* ID of the site where the simulation was run */,
  "response_generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response generator used in the simulation */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., Human_Single) */,
  "exam_id" TEXT /* ID of the exam or scenario being simulated */,
  "task_number" INTEGER /* Number of the task within the exam */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial within the task */,
  "trial_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the trial in milliseconds */,
  "sim_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the simulation */,
  "sim_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_response_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_generator_id") REFERENCES response_generators ("response_generator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "red_forces" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "num_blue_locations" INTEGER /* Number of blue (friendly) locations */,
  "red_capability_Pc" REAL /* Red force capability percentage */,
  "red_vulnerability_P_1" REAL /* Red force vulnerability percentage */,
  "red_opportunity_U_1" INTEGER /* Red force opportunity utility */,
  "red_activity_detected_1" INTEGER /* Red force activity detected (0 or 1) */,
  "red_force_name" TEXT /* Name of the red force (adversary) */,
  "red_force_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the red force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "red_tactics" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "red_tactics_probs_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for red tactics probability calculation */,
  "red_tactics_probs_tactic_1" REAL /* Probability of the first red tactic */,
  "red_tactics_probs_tactic_2" REAL /* Probability of the second red tactic */,
  "red_tactics_batch_plot_trials_reviewed" INTEGER /* Number of trials reviewed in the batch plot */,
  "red_tactics_batch_plot_trials_total" INTEGER /* Total number of trials in the batch plot */,
  "red_tactic_name" TEXT /* Name of the red tactic used */,
  "red_tactic_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the red tactic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blue_forces" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "bluebook_Passive_prob_1" REAL /* Probability of blue force being passive */,
  "bluebook_Aggressive_prob_1" REAL /* Probability of blue force being aggressive */,
  "probs_Pp_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for blue action probability calculation */,
  "probs_Pp_1" REAL /* Probability of the first blue action */,
  "probs_Pp_normative_1" REAL /* Normative probability of the first blue action */,
  "blue_action_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the blue action */,
  "blue_action_1" TEXT /* First blue action taken */,
  "blue_action_expected_utility" REAL /* Expected utility of the first blue action */,
  "blue_action_normative_participant_1" TEXT /* Normative participant action */,
  "blue_action_normative_participant_expected_utility" REAL /* Normative participant expected utility */,
  "blue_action_normative_bayesian_1" TEXT /* Normative Bayesian action */,
  "blue_action_normative_bayesian_expected_utility" REAL /* Normative Bayesian expected utility */,
  "blue_force_name" TEXT /* Name of the blue force (friendly) */,
  "blue_force_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the blue force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, review) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the simulation was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "sim_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the simulation result */,
  "result_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the simulation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
